metadata.permit_type: BES - Sewer Repair PermitSingle Family Dwelling
metadata.work_description: CONTRACTOR TO REPLACE EXISTING LATERAL and INSTALL 6" clean-out either tight to FOC or at PL per DTL P-257. Replacement lateral to be perpendicular to curb from new CO to property line. Contr. to verify depth/location/proper slope/positive connection to public system in the field. REF BES DETAIL P-257 & P-262. Contact x31026. Contractor must verify depth/location and downstream connection point to public system in the field.

activities.activity_name: Check CCB, Plumbing Board licenses OR ch
